lint.note: ESLint never configured (no .eslintrc). Project has ignoreDuringBuilds: true in next.config.mjs. Not a failure - lint was never part of this project's workflow.

nonBlockingIssues.description: RESUME_SETUP.md still references GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET in two places (lines 44 and 54). While outside the feature's explicit scope, this is a residual reference that contradicts the intent of removing webhook secret references.

appliedUpdates.description: Removed stale GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET reference from .factory/library/environment.md since the user doesn't have a webhook secret

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Remove GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET from the 'Environment Variables' section. The user confirmed they don't have a webhook secret, and the production-facing docs (README.md, wrangler.jsonc) no longer reference it.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature remove-webhook-secret-references removed the secret from wrangler.jsonc, README.md, and added a comment in the webhook route noting verification is disabled. But AGENTS.md was not updated.
